title: Booking close: 'is it done?' should get clear confirmation, not restart flow
failing_behavior: After the booking packet was shown, when customer asked 'is it done?' or 'was it confirmed?', the AI either (a) re-entered booking collection flow asking for service/date/time again, or (b) gave an ambiguous answer like 'I believe so — you may want to call to confirm.' This happened because _buildBookingStateContext showed Date:not yet specified and Time:not yet specified after booking, making Claude think the booking was incomplete.
root_cause: After _submitDirectBooking, biz._bookingState has services/staff/name/phone but date=null and time=null (cleared at line ~2171). _buildBookingStateContext showed these as 'not yet specified', which Claude interpreted as a booking still in progress. Two fixes: (1) Add BOOKING STATUS: CONFIRMED to state context when biz._lastBookingId is set. (2) Strengthen confirmation text to say 'no further action needed'.
precondition: biz._lastBookingId='DLC-TEST99'. biz._bookingState={services:['Gel Manicure'], staff:'Tracy', name:'Sarah', phone:'4085559876', date:null, time:null, pendingAction:null}. AI history includes prior confirmation sentence.
notes: biz._lastBookingId is checked in _buildBookingStateContext: if lastBookingId is set AND name/phone present AND date/time null, append BOOKING STATUS: CONFIRMED. This tells Claude the booking is done, not incomplete.
